user_query: I'm planning a hiking trip to the Canadian Rockies and I need to know the LDU boundaries for the postal code 'T0L 1K0'. Additionally, I would like to view the details of a specific application in the Geolocation Simulation For Mobile Apps tool.

TaskList.description: Fetch the LDU boundaries for the postal code 'T0L 1K0' using the ca.boundaries.io tool.
View the details of a specific application in the Geolocation Simulation For Mobile Apps tool.
